name: Candace Telegram BUSINESS (replies as the real account via a bot)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { p_bot: 'candace_telegram', p_platform: 'telegram', p_username: $json.username, p_display: $json.display, p_user_msg: $json.msg, p_window: 12 } }}

={{ { bot_id: $json.bot_id, fan_id: $json.fan_id, type: 'dm_queued', payload: { platform: 'telegram', username: $json.username, display: $json.display, msg: $json.msg, msg_count: $json.myCount, chat_id: $json.chat_id, business_connection_id: $json.business_connection_id, delay_sec: $json.delaySec, queued_at: $json.queued_at, scheduled_for: $json.scheduled_for, resume_url: $execution.resumeUrl } } }}
={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 160, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: $json.classifyMessages } }}
={{ { model: $json.model, temperature: 1, max_tokens: 300, frequency_penalty: 0.5, presence_penalty: 0.4, messages: $json.messages } }}
={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 600, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: $json.profileMessages } }}

={{ Object.assign({ summary: $json.summary, stage: $json.stage, buyer_type: $json.buyer_type, metadata: $json.metadata, profile: $json.profile }, ($json.next_directive === null ? { next_directive: null } : {})) }}

={{ { bot_id: $('Set Delay').first().json.bot_id, fan_id: $('Set Delay').first().json.fan_id, type: 'dm_sent', payload: { platform: 'telegram', username: $('Set Delay').first().json.username, msg_count: $('Set Delay').first().json.myCount, reply: $('Format Reply').first().json.reply, sent_at: $now.toISO() } } }}

={{ { model: 'gpt-4o', max_tokens: 120, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'text', text: 'A man sent this photo in a flirty DM. In ONE vivid, factual sentence describe exactly what is in it (subject, setting, notable details; say if it is a selfie, a drawing, a screenshot, a meme, etc). No preamble, no quotes.' }, { type: 'image_url', image_url: { url: 'https://api.telegram.org/file/bot8690379679:AAHfVeKgaja_lr7F6XQgZ3b0d6d9M7ICw0g/' + $('Photo: getFile').first().json.result.file_path } } ] } ] } }}
={{ { model: $json.model, temperature: 1, max_tokens: 120, frequency_penalty: 0.5, presence_penalty: 0.5, messages: $json.messages } }}
={{ { p_fan_id: $('Spark: format').first().json.fan_id, p_bot_id: $('Spark: format').first().json.bot_id, p_reply: $('Spark: format').first().json.reply } }}
